name: qa-senior-teste-nexdom

scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui
scripts.k6:run: powershell -Command "if (-not (Test-Path .\\k6-results)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path .\\k6-results | Out-Null }; $ts = (Get-Date).ToString('yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'); k6 run k6/load_test.js --out json=k6-results/result-$ts.json"

description: Resumo   Este repositório contém um scaffold de testes automatizados para UI, API e performance:
